programme.desc: S14E2 - Set in Dorset's Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre, this documentary series follows the day-to-day dramas of looking after over 240 primates. (S14, ep 2)

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: S1E4 - Puma: In the mountains of Patagonia, a mother puma has six months to teach her cubs how to survive in a competitive world. (4 of 5)

programme.title: Into The Wild: Colombia
programme.desc: S1E3 - Warriors Of The Llanos: The flat savannahs of the Llanos face seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving land, animals don't get a second chance. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: S1E1 - New & Exclusive. Meet the oddballs of the oceans and witness the remarkable skills they have built over the years, from blind worms who fish to crabs who climb trees and more. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: 761st Tank Battalion: The Original Black Panthers
programme.desc: The powerful story of the first all-Black tank unit to serve in combat in U.S. military history. Under General George Patten's command, the 761st battalion fought heroically throughout WWII and were the furthest east of all U.S. troops in the European theater of war when hostilities ceased in 1945. Their valor went unrecognized for decades until veterans of the battalion and their allies saw to it that they received the honor and recognition they deserved. (Repeat). (Documentary)

(Repeat). (Documentary, Reality, Action & Adventure)

Or is it possible that these curses are real-and there are dark forces at play that defy explanation? (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: The UnXplained

But it seems that for each answer science provides, even more questions arise. Our own solar system is populated by mysterious objects and phenomenon that seem to defy our attempts to understand them. And when we get deeper into space, the mysteries only deepen. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.desc: Jack embarks on a journey to Nevada where an unassuming home hides pirate's treasure. Next, he tours the unique architecture of a house built on a bridge, and his final stop is New Orleans where a historic home is bathed in the history of the city. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Zillow Gone Wild
programme.desc: In Nebraska, Jack enrolls for a unique schoolhouse-turned-family home experience. Then, he tours two deceptive homes: a mountaintop gem in California that literally brings the outside in and a farmhouse in Missouri that holds tiled and mosaic treasures. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Zillow Gone Wild
programme.desc: Jack's first stop on his wild home journey is a listing in Santa Barbara, California, that's inspired by marine biology. Next, he visits a metal-and-glass marvel in Omaha, Nebraska, and then he finds a comic book-inspired lair in Las Vegas. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After losing their mother to cancer, a couple seeks to rebuild their lives in Des Moines, Iowa. One prefers an updated rancher, while the other is willing to put in some sweat equity on a historic two-story with charm. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Stunt performers look to buy a home in Atlanta before their upcoming wedding. He wants a brick Colonial with space for a media room to prepare for his jobs, but she's focused on a modern farmhouse with a soaking tub to help her recuperate from work. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A buyer returns home and looks to buy a house to fit his bougie taste in a trendy Michigan suburb. He's bringing his friend along for help, but she thinks what he wants and what he can afford are worlds apart. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A family needs a home with a lot more space for themselves and their young son, but that comes at a pretty penny in pricey Los Angeles. One is an interior designer and wants an affordable fixer with vintage charm, but the other prefers something modern. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Recently divorced and ready to buy, a young woman searches for an old home in Minneapolis. She's looking for a place she can put her own touches on, but her friend wants to remind her to focus on dating, rather than renovations. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young woman and her husband have worked hard to save up and buy their first house in Florida. After growing up in a trailer, he's ready to spend for a spacious two-story home, but she's pushing for a lower-priced and modern single-story. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After two years of delays, two nurses have decided to buy a house rather than build their own in Louisiana. He thinks they'll get more space if they find something older, but she's having difficulty letting go of the new construction they would've had. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Two immigrants are looking for a home to purchase in Burlington, Vermont. While he's willing to go out of the country for some privacy, she wants to be near town with some modern comforts. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young buyer in the Boston area has been living with her parents for 4 years to save for a place. Everyone's eager for her to get out on her own, but her Dad's fixation with the safety of these old New England properties is slowing them down. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A single mom in Charleston, South Carolina, has been scrimping and saving for years to buy her first home. She won't settle for anything that isn't brand new and exactly what she wants, which could be an issue in this historical city. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A New York City native is looking to buy a property in Fire Island's LGBTQ+ welcoming community. He's bringing his closest friend on the quest, who enjoys the activity on the island's oceanfront, but he's drawn to the quieter bay side. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After recovering from a major illness, a couple searches for an oceanfront property on Oak Island, North Carolina. They're looking for a house big enough to accommodate family and friends, and she wants a pool, although he prefers to avoid too many possible projects. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.desc: The owners want to expand their rental property by converting an old garage into a relaxing vacation spot by the pond. Having previously worked with Scott and Debra, the team is tasked with putting a Scandinavian spin on their waterfront retreat. (New). (Reality)

programme.title: Battle on the Beach

programme.desc: Participants tackle the living room. The three teams compete in an upcycling challenge to determine who can create the best light fixture from thrifted items. Bryan and Sarah Baeumler return to crown thewinners. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.desc: A couple who loves to entertain enjoys living near her family, but their dated home desperately needs a facelift. Hilary looks to give them a beautiful upgrade with space for salsa dancing, while David aims to find them a new home with room to party. (Repeat). (Reality, Comedy)

programme.title: Love It or List It

programme.title: Love It or List It

programme.title: Married to Real Estate

programme.title: Married to Real Estate

programme.desc: Bud and Ashley Boman love their 1905 Victorian house. But they don't love the layout, with all the small rooms. The Bomans would like to have more room for when the kids and grandkids come to visit. Dave and Jenny completely redo the floorplan. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show."

programme.title: The Talk ᴺᵉʷ

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show."

programme.title: Saturday Night Live ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: Live from New York for more than four decades, celebrity hosts join an award-winning ensemble cast to perform comedic sketches, satirical news and digital shorts, alongside popular musical acts. Capturing the pop-culture zeitgeist, the show's sketches and segments often go viral the next day. Over the years, cast members have included Jimmy Fallon, Will Ferrell, Tina Fey, Kate McKinnon, Seth Meyers, Eddie Murphy, Bill Murray, Mike Myers, Amy Poehler, Chris Rock, Maya Rudolph, Andy Samberg, Kristen Wiig, and many more, as well as recurring guests such as Alec Baldwin, Melissa McCarthy and Steve Martin. From executive producer Lorne Michaels, "SNL" is widely considered an American late-night institution and continues to earn critical praise.

programme.title: 48 Hours ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: 60 Minutes ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: Movie (2018) Dr. Don Shirley is a world-class African-American pianist who's about to embark on a concert tour in the Deep South in 1962. In need of a driver and protection, Shirley recruits Tony Lip, a tough-talking bouncer from an Italian-American neighborhood in the Bronx. Despite their differences, the two men soon develop an unexpected bond while confronting racism and danger in an era of segregation.

programme.desc: "NBA Countdown" serves as the primer for game telecasts on the ESPN family of networks. programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Slovenia is up against Serbia in Munich in Group C of EURO 2024. Slovenia's first match at a major tournament was a 3-3 draw versus Yugoslavia in Charleroi in the EURO 2000 group stage. Yugoslavia was trailing 3-0 when Siniša Mihajlovic was sent off. (Soccer)

programme.title: Euro Today
programme.desc: The latest news and analyses from the UEFA European Championship. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Denmark plays England in Frankfurt am Main in Group C of EURO 2024. England beat Denmark 2-1 after extra time at Wembley Stadium in the semi-finals of EURO 2020. Harry Kane scored the winner from a rebound after Kasper Schmeichel saved his penalty. (Soccer)

programme.title: Euro Today
programme.desc: The latest news and analyses from the UEFA European Championship. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Spain plays Italy in Gelsenkirchen in Group B of the 2024 European Championships. These teams have met seven times at the European Championships, the most played fixture in EUROs history. This includes a 4-0 Spain win in the EURO 2012 final in Kyiv. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Belgium contests Romania in Cologne in Group E of EURO 2024. The only competitive meetings were in 1994 World Cup qualifying. Belgium won 1-0 in Brussels (goal by Rudy Smidts) and Romania won 2-1 in Bucharest (home goals by Raducioiu and Dumitrescu). (Soccer)

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: On June 15, 2011, Vancouver hosts Game 7 of the Stanley Cup Finals between the Canucks and Boston Bruins; the city is a hive of nervous energy with the home team on the verge of its first-ever title, but when Boston stuns the Canucks to win the Cup, the situation quickly devolves into a full-blown riot, an orgy of violence that sees cars overturned and burned, windows shattered, businesses looted, and lawlessness reign... as hundreds of cell phone cameras capture it all. (Documentary)

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Hosted by Tony Reali in the ESPN studio and joined via satellite by four panelists from across the country, the team debates popular sports stories. Reali acts as moderator, giving points for well-made arguments and deducting points for those who inspire him to hit the "mute" button. At the end of the show, whomever Reali deems the winner has 30 seconds without interruption to voice their final opinions on any topic they want. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Canada's consumer watchdog series since 1972, this news program uncovers wrongdoings in the marketplace. With the help of hidden cameras, correspondents dish out the dirt on not so "clean" business practices. Once they get the evidence they need on tape, they apply pressure on businesses to change policies vis-a-vis the products and services they provide to the public. (Consumer)

programme.title: CBC News Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the day's top stories and breaking news from across Canada and around the world. (News)

programme.title: CBC News: At Issue
programme.desc: Rosemary Barton hosts this half-hour political forum, which features panelists discussing the week's biggest stories and hottest topics in Canadian politics. (Talk, Politics)

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking. (Newsmagazine)

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: A documentary offering informative views about the state of the world and how to make it a better place. Produced in Canada and abroad, all offer a look at the way the planet changes and shifts in humanity's modernized age. (Documentary, Science, Nature)

programme.title: CBC Newsroom with Deana Sumanac-Johnson
programme.desc: Deana Sumanac-Johnson brings Canadians the latest breaking news from across Canada and around the world. (News)

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Canada's consumer watchdog series since 1972, this news program uncovers wrongdoings in the marketplace. With the help of hidden cameras, correspondents dish out the dirt on not so "clean" business practices. Once they get the evidence they need on tape, they apply pressure on businesses to change policies vis-a-vis the products and services they provide to the public. (Consumer)

programme.desc: Slovenia is up against Serbia in Munich in Group C of EURO 2024. Slovenia's first match at a major tournament was a 3-3 draw versus Yugoslavia in Charleroi in the EURO 2000 group stage. Yugoslavia was trailing 3-0 when Siniša Mihajlovic was sent off. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Denmark plays England in Frankfurt am Main in Group C of EURO 2024. England beat Denmark 2-1 after extra time at Wembley Stadium in the semi-finals of EURO 2020. Harry Kane scored the winner from a rebound after Kasper Schmeichel saved his penalty. (Soccer)

programme.desc: The latest news and analyses from the UEFA European Championship. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Spain plays Italy in Gelsenkirchen in Group B of the 2024 European Championships. These teams have met seven times at the European Championships, the most played fixture in EUROs history. This includes a 4-0 Spain win in the EURO 2012 final in Kyiv. (Soccer)

programme.title: NBA Countdown
programme.desc: "NBA Countdown" serves as the primer for game telecasts on the ESPN family of networks. It's highlighted by a lively roundtable discussion and debate of the top storylines around the league. Seats at the table are reserved for folks in ESPN's stable of NBA hosts and analysts, with the latter group imparting wisdom based on their many years of playing experience. (Basketball)

programme.title: 2024 NBA Finals
programme.desc: The Mavericks host the Celtics for Game 6 of the NBA Finals. Dallas head coach Jason Kidd looks to add his first title in that role to a resume that includes championships in 2020 as an assistant, and with Dallas' last winner in 2011. (If necessary) (Playoff sports, Basketball)

programme.title: The Key of David
programme.desc: Vision Television host Gerald Flurry presents a weekly analysis of world events. Through the perspective of biblical prophecy, Flurry delivers messages of warning, often about issues concerning the growing power and influence of the European Union. From the studios of the Philadelphia Church of God, "The Key of David" attempts to stand out among today's modern devotional programming. Its viewers have referred to the program as frank, bold and rational without an overt emotional sentimentality. (Religious)

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette seems to be a normal teenage girl -- she dreams of becoming a fashion designer, is a bit awkward and has a crush on a classmate. But she has a secret other teenagers don't have -- she lives a double life as a crime-fighting superhero known as Ladybug. She uses her superpowers to help protect her native Paris from supervillain Hawk Moth. She is assisted, reluctantly, by fellow hero Cat Noir, even though she insists she doesn't need him -- a stance she might not take if she knew his alter ego is her crush, Adrien. Together, Ladybug and Cat Noir help keep Paris safe from Hawk Moth and other villains. (Animated, Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: S11E2 - The conclusion to Josh Gates' dive into a Kush king's flooded pyramid tomb; Josh scales a mountain to learn how the Kingdom of Kush conquered Egypt and braves the murky waters for one more dive to find the king's mummified remains. (Adventure, Documentary, History, Mystery, Travel)

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: S13E8 - Josh is on the hunt for the lost tomb of Alexander the Great; he dives Egypt's coast, revealing ruins of Alexander's Royal Quarter; he tunnels under modern Alexandria, but a water pump malfunction puts everything at risk. (Adventure, Documentary, History, Mystery, Travel)

programme.title: Alien Encounters: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: S1E1 - After the death of his father, a farmer believes he witnessed a UFO; a geologist uncovers debris at the Roswell crash site; after seeing an orb in the sky, a mother suffers radiation-like burns on her body. (Science fiction)

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: S4E2 - Josh Gates travels to Hungary to join three separate archeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun; legends and ancient texts lead the search from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest. (Adventure, Documentary, History, Mystery, Travel)

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: S12E1 - Parker bets on a risky claim and loses a key team member. Tony storms a new cut with a fleet of new mega machines. Rick's skeleton crew pulls off a miracle. Fred heads to Klondike seeking an alliance. (Reality, Adventure, Outdoors, Nature)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: S10E10 - Conspiracies swirl around an abandoned military base in Long Island, where it's alleged that covert government experiments took place underground; experts discuss the critical role that the base played in defending America's coastline. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: S10E4 - This Seoul amusement park is full of rusted-out rides and unfinished renovations; forced to close due to financial problems, the park has found a second life after being used as the setting of K-pop album covers and music videos. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: S10E8 - In the Turkish capital, ambitious plans for a new amusement park are disrupted by financial, mechanical and political problems, forcing the park to close; now its old roller coasters stand as symbols of excess on the city skyline. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: S10E1 - A porn baron establishes a hedonistic paradise in hopes of averting nuclear catastrophe -- attracting rich and infamous clients in the process. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: S10E2 - Half-built castles stand as a whimsical reminder of a neighborhood that was supposed to feature thermal baths and panoramic views; the ambitious project came to an abrupt halt when the construction company began to face financial difficulties. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: S10E5 - In a California desert, a once glittering Hollywood hotspot gets converted into a top-secret interrogation center for POWs; before being shuttered, this high-tech facility gathered reams of valuable wartime intelligence. (Documentary, Science)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: S3E8 - New officers entering the ranks are put through their paces, and one rookie proves her worth; a couple from Mexico arrives with candy unfit for children's consumption; a van full of household furniture hides an illicit surprise. (Reality, Documentary)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: S2E6 - A woman returning from a shopping trip in the US attempts to smuggle dirty money into Mexico; a van full of clothes is hiding an exotic shipment; a man finds a clever hiding place for prescription drugs; a family tries to bring in illicit fruits. (Reality, Documentary)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: S2E7 - A drunk driver causes a three-car crash; a man attempts to import counterfeit goods; an investigation is launched into a pill-smuggling ring, and a shipment of cocaine is found inside office furniture; an armed robber on the run is captured. (Reality, Documentary)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: S2E5 - Methamphetamine is found hidden within a semi-truck full of frozen broccoli, a man is caught smuggling pills inside containers of protein powder, a traveler tries to bring a deer trophy across the border, and an intoxicated US citizen is detained. (Reality, Documentary)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: S1E10 - Officers discover methamphetamine hidden inside a truck's speakers and confiscate drugs packed deep within lead boxes; a woman denies trafficking pain pills; a man is interviewed to confirm his citizenship. (Reality, Documentary)

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Border
programme.desc: S1E9 - Upon detaining a woman smuggling Tramadol and Xanax pills, officers discover she is part of a larger drug ring; officers arrest a daily crosser after finding cocaine in her vehicle; an officer's hunch leads to the discovery of 500 kilos of marijuana. (Reality, Documentary)

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: S1E10 - Everything in nature wants to kill humans -- animals, gravity, even the weather; just when one thinks they've conquered nature, nature fights back -- from angry bison and gale-force winds to giant spiders and bear attacks. (Crime, Reality)

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: S1E3 - The average person spends nearly 90,000 hours of their life at work; from contractor showdowns and unexpected explosions to battling coworkers, a workday feels like an epic rollercoaster ride. (Crime, Reality)

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: S1E4 - Convicts making last efforts to break free when their hands are tied; whether a crook on trial or an inmate with a corrections officer, handcuffs, cops and prison walls won't stop this guys from their scaping attempts. (Crime, Reality)

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: When crooks and criminals run for freedom, the police aren't far behind; lawbreakers utilize every tool at their disposal to make their escape and officers must do the same in this dangerous battle of wits, speed and weaponry. (Crime, Reality)

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: Uncharted wilderness and untamed backcountry full of rugged terrain and wild inhabitants; police officers surviving and thriving as they take down criminals, prevent catastrophes and save lives. (Crime, Reality)

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: In the world of air travel, crime and misconduct are skyrocketing, causing unruly travelers to be denied boarding; protesting passengers create turbulence for everyone on board; when mechanical issues arise, the real chaos begins. (Crime, Reality)

programme.title: Caught
programme.desc: Every year, thousands of law enforcement put their lives in danger to protect and serve; but, in high-velocity situations, life-or-death decisions come in like rapid fire; in the line of fire, all bets are off. (Crime, Reality)

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: S1E4 - Holidays highlight unique traditions, but when clashing personalities and lots of alcohol get mixed, mayhem and memorable stories are sure to follow. (Crime, Reality)

(Reality, Documentary, Auto racing)

programme.title: Dual Survival

programme.desc: S1E10 - Code and Dave wade through piranha-infested water in Brazil's Pantanal. (Reality, Nature, How-to, Adventure)

programme.desc: S5E14 - Mike Rowe has the unenviable job of collecting cow dung to use as bait for catching dung beetles; then he heads to West Virginia to try his hand at making glass. (Reality)

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: S4E6 - Everything goes wrong for Mike at a California mineral mine; then it's off to South Carolina to master rice milling. (Reality)

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: S3E5 - Mike takes on one of his dirtiest jobs to date as he excavates wine caverns in California's Napa Valley; later he has the unenviable task of incinerating rubbish at Kansas Airport. (Reality)

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: S4E16 - Mike and the crew take on their 150th dirty job as they travel to the Spring Brook Ranch in Kalispell, Montana, and help out a yak and bison rancher. (Reality)

programme.title: Dirty Jobs

programme.title: Sunday Morning Futures With Maria Bartiromo
programme.desc: As part of her role as FOX Business Network's global markets editor, business journalist Maria Bartiromo hosts this weekly Sunday morning show on FBN sister network FOX News Channel that focuses more on the general economy than the stock market specifically. The hourlong show provides viewers with information about how recent news events affect the economy. In addition, Bartiromo interviews business leaders and newsmakers on topics that include job creation and investment opportunities. (Bus./financial)

programme.title: MediaBuzz
programme.desc: Veteran journalist Howard Kurtz is no stranger to criticizing the media. He did it for 20 years as a media columnist for The Washington Post and as host of CNN's long-running "Reliable Sources" from 1998 through the first half of 2013. So it's no surprise that shortly after departing CNN in mid-2013 for rival Fox News Channel he would premiere a show for his new employer that is modeled after his previous program. In addition to Kurtz and his weekly panel discussing how the press covers a variety of topics that include technology, social media, politics and sports, the host also interviews some of the country's top journalists. And, as you might expect in these social mediacentric times, "MediaBuzz" features some viewers' questions and comments on the show. (News, Talk, Public affairs, Politics)

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Approximately 51 percent of the U.S. population is made up of women, but on "Outnumbered" the female advantage jumps to a 4-1 ratio. The hourlong show features a rotating panel of four women and one man discussing the day's headlines from various perspectives. In addition to the top news of the hour, the panelists discuss leading pop culture and relationship issues making headlines that day. Regular FNC and FBN contributors appearing on the show on a rotational basis include Harris Faulkner, Meghan McCain and Pete Hegseth. (News)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S9E4 - Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli's favorite lemon bars; Tregaye Fraser has a new take on an old classic in Atlanta. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S8E12 - Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few food personalities sharing their favorite ways to indulge in cheesy goodness; a cheese curd-stuffed bratwurst; a fried cheese work of art, macaroni and cheese; Queso Fundido. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S8E9 - Sharing seven popular go-to dishes from restaurants across the country; Jason Smith visits an ice cream shop; Bobby Flay reveals his secret neighborhood joint; Beau MacMillan shares his favorite salad; Katie Lee admits her love for a grilled pizza. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S7E8 - Miami cuisine, from stone crabs at Joe's, to the lamb shank at Sardinia; Fratelli La Bufala turns out pillowy calzones; Ola offers a pear granita; a trifecta of treats at Michaels Genuine and the chocolate peanut butter s'more from Prime 112. (Cooking)

programme.title: Man Fire Food
programme.desc: S3E2 - Chef Johnny Hernandez cooks in an outdoor kitchen; Lamb Barbacoa; branzino wrapped in banana leaves; corn tortillas toasted on a clay griddle. (Cooking)

programme.title: Man Fire Food
programme.desc: S3E2 - Chef Johnny Hernandez cooks in an outdoor kitchen; Lamb Barbacoa; branzino wrapped in banana leaves; corn tortillas toasted on a clay griddle. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Zimmern List
programme.desc: S2E9 - Andrew heads to Providence, R.I., one of the oldest cities in America and home to a unique food scene; he savors authentic Portuguese-style seafood, discovers a refreshing take on New England pub food and is wowed by a one-of-a-kind tasting menu. (Cooking, Travel, Reality)

programme.title: The Zimmern List
programme.desc: S1E18 - Andrew tours Washington, D.C., where he connects with a congresswoman over a power breakfast of Moroccan grits, savors the international flavors of Union Market and enjoys his go-to sweet potato pie from Henry's Soul Food Cafe. (Cooking, Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Total Body Fitness
programme.desc: Build the body you've always wants with Total Flex! Delivered almost fully assembled - start exercising in just minutes! Total Flex is the ultra-compact, affordable total body fitness solution! (Consumer)

programme.title: Silver Rare Morgans
programme.desc: Add this Set of 5 Morgan Dollars from 1879 to 1921 graded in MS64 condition to your collection. Each coin comes from one of the 5 decades and mints that the Morgan Dollar was struck in, comprising some of the most significant coins in the series. (Consumer)

programme.title: Save On Your Grocery Bills!
programme.desc: Tired of throwing away spoiled groceries? Keep food fresh 5X longer with the new PowerXL Duo Nutrisealer! (Cooking, Consumer)

programme.title: Organic Sourdough Bread at Home!
programme.desc: Incredible new multi-cooker - Air Fryer, Bread Maker, Slow Cooker, and Oven all in one! (Consumer)

programme.title: Ninja Woodfire Outdoor Grill
programme.desc: Meet the Shark Ninja Wood Fire Grill, with Master Grill, BBQ Smoke, and Air Fry outdoor capabilities. Powered by electricity and flavored by real burning wood pellets, Woodfire Technology allows you to easily create rich flavor you can see and taste. (Consumer)

programme.title: Fix Flats Fast!
programme.desc: Experience the power of the Bullseye Pro Automatic Digital Tire Inflator! This amazing car tire air compressor is the go-to for any home improvement project. With its 2 LED displays, battery level and target pressure, it's user-friendly! (Consumer)

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: S4E18 - Tacos are more than a staple of Mexican cuisine, they're a carnival favorite; Noah eats seven of the nation's most creative tacos; from a fresh succulent soft shell crab taco to authentic Tacos Al Pastor, Noah gets wrapped up in tantalizing tacos. (Cooking, Travel)

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: S4E24 - On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas, including a breakfast pizza in Georgia, an awesome pizza in a cone and a funnel cake pizza at the Florida State Fair. (Cooking, Travel)

programme.title: Unwrapped
programme.desc: S21E4 - Crunchy snacks. (Documentary)

programme.title: Unwrapped
programme.desc: S21E8 - Companies that are putting a new twist on chocolate desserts. (Documentary)

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded
programme.desc: S1E8 - Alton Brown reloads his classic cocoa powder show with three updated dishes, including a new twist on brownies, an introduction to black cardamom, and a scientific road race. (Cooking, How-to)

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded
programme.desc: S1E9 - Alton Brown reloads this episode on lemon meringue pie with a new crust, a new filling and a new meringue. (Cooking, How-to)

programme.title: Man v. Food
programme.desc: S10E3 - Casey Webb makes his way to Richmond for a lesson on New Zealand-style savory pies, an elevated Jewish deli experience and a towering Ladder Burger Challenge. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: Man v. Food
programme.desc: S11E4 - Casey Webb pays a visit to Oakland, Calif., for a towering banana split, a hot-off-the-grill molcajete, and spring roll warfare as he faces the 3.5-pound Lumpia Challenge. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: Man v. Food
programme.desc: S8E31 - Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: Man v. Food
programme.desc: S11E1 - Casey Webb's palate-expanding pilgrimage takes him to Orlando, Fla., for a hunger-slaying sandwich, a famous footlong and an 8.5-pound team challenge so big that he calls in backup from hometown hero and heartthrob Joey Fatone. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: S1E6 - Regional pride and bragging rights are a big part of the evolution of these exceptional pork dishes, not to mention the unbelievable variety; featuring pig cheeks, pig feet, bacon bombs, ribs, ham, pork wings, and whole hog. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: S1E3 - Roger Mooking searches the country for the top fifteen finest cuts and the most perfect intersections of meat, seasoning, and fire. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: S2E1 - From traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers; learning everything there is to know about each cut of beef; some of the best beef-centric recipes in the country and all of their steer-crazy secrets. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: S15E2 - Heading to Nashville, Tenn., in search of craveworthy comfort food that satisfies the soul, from barbecue to burgers and even a Thai twist on pizza. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: S15E3 - The search for eateries across America that offer the most bang for one's burger buck begins with a beefy, back-to-basics bargain in Las Vegas for only $7; wasabi mashed potato burger; Texas-sized backyard barbecue masterpiece on a bun. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S9E3 - Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa; a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos; Alex Guarnaschelli's favorite Al Pastor at Lene Brave in Chicago is so good, it has customers begging for more. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S9E1 - Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish; Ali Khan chats up his favorite chicken parmigiana sandwich; Alex Guarnaschelli gives a shout out to a not-to-be-missed lasagna; Duff Goldman's pick for the best dish to end an Italian meal. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S8E11 - Justin Warner shares a NY pizza enclosed in the ultimate crispy crust; Alex Guarnaschelli visits New Orleans for her favorite bite at Turkey and the Wolf; Fanny Slater shares her favorite Crispy Tuna Roll in Hawaii. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S8E4 - Dream-worthy oysters at Hog Island; the pork bun at Yank Sing; the souffle at Cafe Jacqueline; the strudel at Schmidt's; the pain au chocolat at Tartine. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S12E12 - Ditching the kitchen for the most amazing dishes made table side; Anne Burrell gets up close and personal with prime rib in Chicago; Richard Blais goes weak in the knees for ice cream made before his very eyes. (Cooking)

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programme.desc: S11E18 - Nothing matches the incredible taste of food cooked with an open flame; Marc Murphy chows down on some irresistible charred wings in Rochester, N.Y., while Brad Miller brings the fire with a cognac flambéed pasta in Los Angeles. (Cooking)

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: S10E3 - Noah Cappe starts his journey out west to the Arizona State Fair; a beautifully grilled burger packed with flamin' hot cheese puffs; a Watermelon Taco. (Cooking, Travel)

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: S7E9 - The Cowboy Breakfast ends the day with the uniquely sweet Caramel Apple Tots; Noah challenges himself to the 5 Pounderito and tries the finger-licking Ice Cream Funnelwich. (Cooking, Travel)

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: S7E9 - The Cowboy Breakfast ends the day with the uniquely sweet Caramel Apple Tots; Noah challenges himself to the 5 Pounderito and tries the finger-licking Ice Cream Funnelwich. (Cooking, Travel)

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: S9E4 - The Winter Fest OC; west coast nuggets; sweet potato pile; the frozen banana cane; the breakfast funnel cake; the honey nut crunch burger. (Cooking, Travel, Documentary)

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: S5E11 - Bursting with beauty and culinary icons of near mythical proportion, the Greek island of Santorini is home to tomato fritters, lamb fricassee and natural delicacies like grilled octopus. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: S5E4 - From saffron-tinted risotto and warming minestrone to impossibly fluffy, fruity panettone, Andrew Zimmern shows how Milan's rich and refined dishes earned a place in the international culinary cannon. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: S6E18 - Andrew Zimmern discovers the complex flavors of Phnom Penh, Cambodia, including spicy grilled crab, beef salad, and herbaceous fish and noodle soup, all of which reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: S5E8 - Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China; from creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple. (Travel, Cooking)

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: S10E3 - Noah Cappe starts his journey out west to the Arizona State Fair; a beautifully grilled burger packed with flamin' hot cheese puffs; a Watermelon Taco. (Cooking, Travel)

programme.title: Carnival Eats
